questionHtml: Using the data from 1998 to 2004, evaluate whether the use of glyphosate has a greater impact on the environment than other herbicides.
markschemeHtml:
a. glyphosate use increased and other herbicide use decreased;

b. during this period there was no increase/decrease in the EIQ
OR
the data shows that there was not much change in environmental impact;

c. data insufficient to reach conclusion;

Both must be mentioned for the mark.

meta.title: Using the data from 1998 to 2004, evaluate whether the use of glyphosate has a greater impact on the environment than other herbicides.
